docs.name: Scramble Text
docs.description: Matrix-style text scramble effect that resolves characters left-to-right.

props.name: text
props.description: The target string the scramble transition eventually resolves into.

props.name: className
props.description: Standard Tailwind configuration for typographic adjustment.

props.name: speed
props.description: Multiplier scaling the character mutation flip rate.

props.name: scrambleDuration
props.description: Duration the sequence spends generating noise before revealing real characters.

props.name: triggerOnView
props.description: Wait until intersection observers detect the element on screen before starting.

props.name: once
props.description: Lock the transition state as resolved after completing one full loop.

props.name: characterSet
props.description: A custom dictionary string configuring the alphabet the noise generator selects from.

docs.overview: ScrambleText rapidly cycles through random characters before resolving to the final string, giving text a cinematic decryption reveal. Triggers on scroll entry by default, or on hover when triggerOnView is false.

scenarios.title: Terminal-style hero headline
scenarios.description: Place ScrambleText on a dark hero section to mimic a hacker-terminal aesthetic as the page loads.

scenarios.title: Hover-to-decode nav labels
scenarios.description: Set triggerOnView=false so the effect fires on mouse enter — great for navigation links or interactive badges.

scenarios.title: Redacted-then-revealed quote
scenarios.description: Reveal a testimonial quote with a scramble effect as the reader scrolls to the section.

motion.performanceNotes: Text scramble effect is the component's only feature; offering a static fallback would eliminate its purpose.
